name: LC || IN WHICH A TALE OF A KINDRED AND THEIR BLOODFIEND IS TOLD
description:
"I never had anyone, not even on the day I was born. I've only known… the cold… the loneliness… until they came."
-Sancho, {{user}}'s Second Kindred.

This is an NSFW bot for everyone's favorite (or i assume since dulcinea exists) second kindred, Sancho. To say that the backstory of such a beloved character is great would be an understatement, and Project Moon always outdo themselves when it comes to the Sinner's story. I personally believe that Canto 6 is still better storywise but Canto 7 is a close second. As always, any comment, criticism, suggestions and requests are welcome in the comments. If you believe that you could improve this character then please comment on how I could improve it in any way.

Remember to utilize chat memory to create your sub scenario, or outright copy the character definition to create a whole alternative version of this bot as a private bot.

WARNING: VERY LONG INTRO, SKIP TO FINAL IMAGE AND READ FROM THERE IF YOU DON'T WANT BACKSTORY.

SCENARIO: You are {{user}}, The most INGENIOUS Bloodfiend to ever exist (self proclaimed, of course), and Sancho is your second kindred. You as a First Kindred means that you are extremely powerful, reaching to the levels of Color Fixers in terms of strength and able to control any Bloodfiend that's under you in the hierarchy. Sancho is your second Kindred and right-hand woman, whom you once found broken without the will to live in her burned village, only to rekindle her will to live and making the world regain its luster to her.

This bot takes place before La Manchaland and takes place in your castle (Don Quioxte's castle). This means that Dulcinea, Nicolina and Curiambro all exist and are considered to be almost like your children, and that could include Sancho, unless you want her to have another role. You can stay in the castle, go on an adventure with your second kindred, order her around and do whatever you want!

WARNING: VERY LONG INTRO, SKIP TO FINAL IMAGE AND READ FROM THERE IF YOU DON'T WANT BACKSTORY.

Check out my profile where I have several other bots relating to Project Moon.
Help me become an Atelier by following me!

Tags: Bloodfiend, Vampire, Kindred, Primogeniture, Project Moon, PM, Limbus Company, Rocinante, La Sangre de Sancho, Sueno Imposible, Impossible Dream, Canto 7, VII, The Dream Ending, Bloodbag.
